2606.22578.title: Context-Aware Distillation and Ablation for Text2DSL
2606.22578.paper_summary: We extend our prior work on Text2DSL automatic generation of domain-specific language (DSL) code from natural language descriptions along two complementary axes. First, we replace prompt-only synthetic generation with context-aware distillation, in which a teacher large language model (DeepSeek-V4-Flash) operates under an explicitly defined structured context comprising a BNF grammar, an API specification, and a closed identifier vocabulary; the resulting corpus is verified by a two-tier pipeline combining AST validation through esprima and runtime acceptance through the production polkitd daemon and the pkcheck client. This scales the verified PolkitBench corpus from 4,204 to 10,073 natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs at 100.0% AST validity and 99.7% runtime pass rate. Second, we conduct the per-component factorial ablation of structured context that was identified as future work in the precursor study: eight conditions C0-C7 are evaluated on GigaChat-10B-A1.8B with the new corpus. Three findings emerge. (i) The new harder corpus collapses the baseline mode (Syntax Valid 97.6% -> 58.5%, Combined Score 0.482 -> 0.252), whereas the context-enhanced mode degrades only marginally (Syntax 98.6% -> 97.4%, Combined 0.801 -> 0.750), confirming that structured context is not a cosmetic improvement but a load-bearing mechanism. (ii) The best absolute condition is the full context C7 across all metrics, while the strongest partial conditions (C5 = BNF + Vocabulary, C6 = API + Vocabulary) both contain the vocabulary. (iii) A Shapley-style decomposition assigns the largest semantic-quality effect to the vocabulary (Combined +0.198), the largest structural-validity effects to API (+24.7 pp) and BNF (+22.3 pp).
2606.22578.paper_summary_zh: 我們擴展了先前關於從自然語言描述自動生成領域特定語言（DSL）代碼的 Text2DSL 研究，沿著兩個互補的軸線進行。首先，我們用上下文感知的蒸餾取代了僅基於提示的合成生成，其中一個教師大型語言模型（DeepSeek-V4-Flash）在明確定義的結構上下文下運作，該上下文包括 BNF 語法、一個 API 規範和一個封閉的標識符詞彙；所生成的語料庫通過一個兩級管道進行驗證，該管道結合了通過 esprima 的 AST 驗證和通過生產 polkitd 守護進程及 pkcheck 客戶端的運行時接受。這將經過驗證的 PolkitBench 語料庫從 4,204 擴展到 10,073 對自然語言到 Polkit 規則的配對，且 AST 的有效性為 100.0%，運行時通過率為 99.7%。其次，我們對在前期研究中確定的結構上下文進行逐組件的因子消融：在 GigaChat-10B-A1.8B 上使用新語料庫評估了八個條件 C0-C7。三個發現浮現出來。(i) 新的更難語料庫使基線模式崩潰（語法有效性 97.6% -> 58.5%，綜合得分 0.482 -> 0.252），而上下文增強模式僅輕微下降（語法 98.6% -> 97.4%，綜合 0.801 -> 0.750），確認結構上下文不是一種表面改進，而是一種承載機制。(ii) 在所有指標中，最佳的絕對條件是完整上下文 C7，而最強的部分條件（C5 = BNF + 詞彙，C6 = API + 詞彙）均包含詞彙。(iii) Shapley 風格的分解將最大的語義質量效應分配給詞彙（綜合 +0.198），將最大的結構有效性效應分配給 API (+24.7 pp) 和 BNF (+22.3 pp)。
2606.22578.author: Alexander V. Kozachok et.al.
2606.22578.authors: Alexander V. Kozachok, Alexander M. Nazimov, Shamil G. Magomedov
